changes.description: Added 'jsx': 'preserve' to compilerOptions; added results/extracted/**/*.tsx to include list

Added: (1) skip-marker detection for <!-- doc-as-test: skip --> and {/* doc-as-test: skip */} styles; (2) JSX detection — React/JSX blocks are now written as .tsx instead of .ts; (3) source line range comment '// source: <page>:<start>-<end>' in each extracted file; (4) skipped_blocks list in manifest

Added: (1) reads '// source:' comment from each extracted file for source_line_range in failure report; (2) updated filename regex to match both .ts and .tsx; (3) blocks_skipped from manifest included in stats and effective rate calculation
Re-run report: 72 extracted + 4 skipped, 69 passed (96.1% effective rate), 3 failures all with real source_line_range

Added 4 skip markers: {/* doc-as-test: skip (illustrative partial snippet — class method body without enclosing class) */} before blocks 3, 4, 5, 6 (unflagMessage and checkIfMessageIsFlagged class method examples)

flag-unflag-a-message.mdx_blocks_3_4_5_6.reason: Class method bodies (unflagMessage, checkIfMessageIsFlagged) extracted without their enclosing class shell. Intentionally illustrative — they show one method with this.xxx() calls that require class context. Could not compile without wrapping in a class, which would be fabrication. Skip markers added to doc.

authentication.mdx_blocks_4_8.reason: Both blocks have a missing trailing comma after 'displayName: John Doe' before 'authToken' in the client.login() object literal. Real doc bug — parser error TS1005 ',' expected. Not skipped; flagged for a follow-up fix PR.

get-user-information.mdx_block_1.reason: Block calls UserRepository.getUser(userId, setUser) but setUser is undeclared; the correct variable is setUserData (from the useState destructure above). Real doc bug — callback uses the wrong identifier. TS1005 '} expected' is a secondary parse error from the truncated component body.

get-user-information.mdx_block_2.reason: Full React component with JSX return. Was failing because .ts extension rejects JSX. Now correctly detected as JSX and written as .tsx — passes after Part A + JSX detection fix.

file_image_video_viewing-content_jsx_blo.reason: All 4 JSX-failing blocks from v1.0 now correctly detected and written as .tsx. Passes after jsx:preserve tsconfig change.

preamble_expansion_opportunities: get-user-information.mdx block 1 uses setUser (undefined) — a preamble addition of 'declare function setUser(v: any): void' would let it compile, but the correct fix is the doc bug (setUser → setUserData). Recommend doc fix not preamble expansion.

viewing-content.mdx block 7 uses getRoomPlaybackUrls (undefined) — function imported from Room SDK, not in preamble. A preamble stub would help but block also uses useRef without importing react — actual doc bug. Flag for follow-up.

needs_review_items.bug: Missing trailing comma after displayName in client.login() object literal
setUser used as callback but setUserData is the declared variable — wrong identifier
